name: che-claude-plugins
description: Che Cheng's Claude Code Plugin Marketplace - 學術研究與生產力工具

plugins.name: che-apple-mail-mcp
plugins.description: Apple Mail MCP Server + 郵件工作流（歸檔、搜尋、管理）

plugins.name: r-shiny-debugger
plugins.description: 功能測試導向的 R Shiny App Debug 工具，整合 agent-browser 與 R console

plugins.name: che-archive-lines
plugins.description: 歸檔 LINE macOS 聊天記錄到文字檔，使用座標點擊自動化

plugins.name: ai-docs-guide
plugins.description: Auto-triggered Skills for querying Claude Code and OpenAI official documentation via WebFetch

plugins.name: claude-config-guide
plugins.description: [Deprecated — replaced by ai-docs-guide] Claude Code 設定查詢助手

plugins.name: che-things-mcp
plugins.description: Things 3 任務管理 MCP Server - 47 個工具支援完整 GTD 工作流程

plugins.name: che-ical-mcp
plugins.description: macOS 行事曆與提醒事項 MCP Server - EventKit 整合，20 個工具

plugins.name: che-duckdb-mcp
plugins.description: DuckDB MCP Server - 整合文檔查詢與資料庫操作，14 個工具

plugins.name: che-word-mcp
plugins.description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，105 個工具支援完整 Word 文件處理

plugins.name: postgresql-guide
plugins.description: Auto-triggered Skill for querying PostgreSQL official documentation

plugins.name: claude-switch
plugins.description: Claude Code 多帳號管理：切換帳號、列出帳號、自動設定 IDE symlink 解決 VS Code 偵測問題

plugins.name: che-xcode-mcp
plugins.description: App Store Connect MCP Server — 99 tools across 15 domain managers covering the full ASC API

plugins.name: che-dropbox-ignore
plugins.description: Dropbox 同步排除管理 — 自動對 .git、build artifacts 等設定 com.dropbox.ignored xattr
